question: What is the capital of India?
description: New Delhi is the capital and seat of government of India. It is located in the northern part of the country.

question: Which planet is known as the Red Planet?
description: Mars appears red because its surface is covered with iron oxide (rust). It is the fourth planet from the Sun.

question: Who wrote the national anthem of India?
description: Jana Gana Mana was written by Rabindranath Tagore. It was adopted as the national anthem on January 24, 1950.

question: What is the chemical symbol for water?
description: Water is composed of two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom. Its chemical formula is H2O.
